title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF ROXAS, STO. TOMAS, TALOLORA AND SALVACION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MONDRAGON, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 593 / 55 OG No. 23, 4217 (June 8, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2171, April 26, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF ROXAS, STO. TOMAS, TALOLORA AND SALVACION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MONDRAGON, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following barrios are hereby created in the Municipality of Mondragon, Province of Samar:

Barrio Roxas, consisting of the sitios of Manlupig, Camaybayan and Caglitid;

Barrio Sto. Tomas, consisting of the sitios of Palanas, Malbog and Catoto-ogan;

Barrio Talolora, consisting of the sitios of Canamocan, Pamogha-an and Cancaturas; and

Barrio Salvacion, consisting of the sitios of Cagpanitan, Caghanadgong, Caragingay and Cagmanaba.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 26, 1959.
